title: Quiet Happy Ghasts
body:
# Quiet Happy Ghasts

This resource pack reduces happy ghast sounds by 95%.

Vanilla Tweaks only lets you reduce the sounds of both Happy Ghasts AND Regular Ghasts at the same time, so this pack is useful if you only want to affect Happy Ghast sounds.

This is nice if you think happy ghasts are a little too loud but you still want to be able to hear the bad ghasts coming up behind you.

Credits:\
Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/
